	/* nova_ext_sim_central:display_name v1 START - managed block, do not edit by hand */
	public function get_character_name($character = '', $showRank = false, $showShortRank = false, $showBioLink = false)
	{
		if (class_exists('nova_ext_sim_central\\Character')) {
			return \nova_ext_sim_central\Character::name($character, $showRank, $showShortRank, $showBioLink);
		}

		return parent::get_character_name($character, $showRank, $showShortRank, $showBioLink);
	}
	/* nova_ext_sim_central:display_name END */
